description_long: This is an electric guitar with a deep red, double-cutaway body that features a slightly angular, modern design. The body is accented by two visible metallic control knobs and a bridge, with three strings running from the bridge up the neck to the headstock. The neck is long and slender, leading to a pointed headstock with two tuning pegs visible on either side. The back of the guitar is smooth and unadorned, with the same rich red finish as the front. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, making it suitable for urban music scenes or street performances.
description: A modern, deep red electric guitar with a double-cutaway body, three strings, and metallic hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red body, three strings, metallic bridge, and two control knobs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's slim profile and the protruding bridge and knobs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned red back of the guitar body and neck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thinness of the guitar and the hardware's slight protrusion.
attribute_headstock_design: Pointed headstock with two tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo
